items.name_en: GUCCI New Wallet Arrivals, also usable as a wallet, is a practical design item promoted by the brand. The classic GG pattern is one of the iconic elements the brand started using in the 1930s, and after nearly a century of development, it still provides inspiration for the brand to explore new expressions.

items.name_en: !!️《Complete Original Retail Packaging》!!️【New】This GG Marmont chain wallet is crafted with care from Matelassé leather. The series' iconic double G accessories make the design even more full.

!!️《Complete Original Retail Packaging》!!️【New】This GG Marmont chain wallet is crafted with care from Matelassé leather. The series' iconic double G accessories make the design even more full.
Light blue quilted V-shaped leather
Silver-tone hardware
Light blue taffeta lining
Double G
Interior: 12 card slots and 3 coin slip pockets
Full zip coin pocket
Model: 837758
Size: 19cm (W) x 10.5cm (H) x 2cm (D)
Color: Light blue full leather
Made in Italy
